title_hint: AI policy aziendale: come scriverla (template operativo per PMI)
dedupNotes: Practical, evergreen template for the internal AI-usage policy a PMI writes for its team (chi puo usare cosa, dati, approvazioni, log). NOT the AI Act pillar (the law) and not the formazione pillar; this is the operative document. Low factual risk, good first auto-publish.

title_hint: Assessment AI interno: la guida operativa prima di chiamare un fornitore
dedupNotes: How to run a lightweight internal AI-readiness assessment (mappare processi, dati, ore perse, baseline) before engaging anyone. Complements the consulenza pillar and the /check-up tool; operative, evergreen, low risk.

title_hint: AI Act per PMI: la checklist operativa di conformita (cosa fare entro agosto 2026)
dedupNotes: Operative step-by-step compliance checklist + timeline. Distinct from /guide/ai-act-aziende (overview of the law) and the blog AI Act posts (high-risk/recruiting): this is 'what to DO'. Every regulatory claim must cite Reg. (UE) 2024/1689 articles; strong fit for the ask-Soraia-for-an-honest-read CTA.

title_hint: Automatizzare la compliance documentale: GDPR, audit trail e report con l'AI
dedupNotes: Operative guide on automating recurring compliance documents (DPA register, audit trail, report ricorrenti) with agents; ties to /finance and the Numeraria case, not a law explainer.

title_hint: NIS2 e PMI italiane: obblighi di cybersecurity e dove l'AI riduce il carico
dedupNotes: What NIS2 obliges for in-scope Italian SMEs and where AI/automation genuinely helps (monitoring, triage, audit). Regulatory, must attribute to the NIS2 directive / ACN; honest about who is actually in scope.

title_hint: Incentivi e credito d'imposta per AI e digitalizzazione PMI 2026: cosa sapere prima di contarci
dedupNotes: Honest landscape of incentives/credito d'imposta touching AI/digitalization, with explicit 'verify with your commercialista, and ask Soraia for an honest read on whether it fits your project' framing. High attribution discipline required (Agenzia delle Entrate / MIMIT sources or cut).

title_hint: Garante Privacy e AI: i punti fermi che ogni PMI deve conoscere
dedupNotes: Operative read of the Italian DPA's stance on AI (basi giuridiche, trasparenza, valutazioni d'impatto) for SMEs. Every cited provvedimento must be named; honest about what is settled vs evolving.
